requirement_topic.en: Nicaragua Grid Connection — MEM / INE / ENATREL Review, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 60 Hz / 120-240 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 尼加拉瓜并网接入——MEM / INE / ENATREL审查、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及60 Hz / 120-240 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 尼加拉瓜併網接入——MEM / INE / ENATREL審查、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及60 Hz / 120-240 V參數

summary.en: Grid-tied solar PV inverter projects in Nicaragua should be treated as project-level interconnection approvals involving MEM policy context, INE regulation, ENATREL transmission / system coordination where relevant, and the applicable distribution company, commonly DISNORTE/DISSUR. Nicaragua is an Americas-style 60 Hz market with low-voltage service commonly framed around 120/240 V, not a China-style 50 Hz / 220-380 V system. For inverter evidence, project reviewers commonly expect IEC-based documentation such as IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, validated with the firmware settings, trip thresholds, reconnection delays, and voltage/frequency windows intended for the Nicaraguan grid.
summary.zh: 尼加拉瓜并网太阳能光伏逆变器项目应按项目级接入审批处理，涉及MEM政策背景、INE监管、相关情况下的ENATREL输电/系统协调，以及适用配电公司（通常为DISNORTE/DISSUR）。尼加拉瓜属于美洲式60 Hz市场，低压供电通常按120/240 V理解，并非中国式50 Hz / 220-380 V系统。逆变器证据方面，项目审查通常需要IEC体系文件，例如IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，并须使用拟用于尼加拉瓜电网的固件设置、跳闸阈值、重连延迟和电压/频率窗口进行验证。
summary.zht: 尼加拉瓜併網太陽能光伏逆變器項目應按項目級接入審批處理，涉及MEM政策背景、INE監管、相關情況下的ENATREL輸電/系統協調，以及適用配電公司（通常為DISNORTE/DISSUR）。尼加拉瓜屬於美洲式60 Hz市場，低壓供電通常按120/240 V理解，並非中國式50 Hz / 220-380 V系統。逆變器證據方面，項目審查通常需要IEC體系文件，例如IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，並須使用擬用於尼加拉瓜電網的韌體設置、跳閘閾值、重連延遲和電壓/頻率窗口進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: MEM / INE electricity-sector oversight and project approval context for Nicaragua
ENATREL and relevant distributor interconnection requirements for grid-tied projects
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Nicaragua grid context — 60 Hz and 120/240 V low-voltage service; confirm project-specific voltage with ENATREL or the distributor

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding reports. These documents are based on China's 50 Hz grid and 220/380 V voltage baseline. They do not establish that the inverter firmware, protection relay settings, power-quality behavior, or anti-islanding response has been validated for Nicaragua's 60 Hz / 120-240 V environment.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入规定、NB/T 32004并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛报告。这些文件基于中国50 Hz电网和220/380 V电压基准，不能证明逆变器固件、保护继电器整定、电能质量行为或防孤岛响应已针对尼加拉瓜60 Hz / 120-240 V环境验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入規定、NB/T 32004併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島報告。這些文件基於中國50 Hz電網和220/380 V電壓基準，不能證明逆變器韌體、保護繼電器整定、電能品質行為或防孤島響應已針對尼加拉瓜60 Hz / 120-240 V環境驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: a Chinese 50 Hz grid-connection package is not Nicaragua grid-ready. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence at 60 Hz, IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, a parameter-setting file for Nicaragua voltage/frequency windows, reconnection and trip settings, power-quality data, wiring and protection drawings, and commissioning procedures acceptable to the project engineer, ENATREL where applicable, and the distribution company. Where factory firmware was validated only for China, reconfiguration and retesting should be documented before interconnection submission.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz并网资料包并不等同于尼加拉瓜并网就绪。出口商应准备60 Hz下的IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727并网接口证据、尼加拉瓜电压/频率窗口参数文件、重连和跳闸设置、电能质量数据、接线和保护图纸，以及项目工程师、相关情况下ENATREL和配电公司可接受的调试程序。若出厂固件仅针对中国验证，则应在提交接入申请前记录重新配置和重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz併網資料包並不等同於尼加拉瓜併網就緒。出口商應準備60 Hz下的IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727併網介面證據、尼加拉瓜電壓/頻率窗口參數文件、重連和跳閘設置、電能品質資料、接線和保護圖紙，以及項目工程師、相關情況下ENATREL和配電公司可接受的調試程序。若出廠韌體僅針對中國驗證，則應在提交接入申請前記錄重新配置和重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects — MEM/INE regulatory context and ENATREL or distributor interconnection acceptance are project gates; 60 Hz / 120-240 V settings must be confirmed for the actual connection point
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid operator expectations but does not transfer to Nicaragua interconnection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nicaragua's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid is a real engineering gate for Chinese PV inverters validated at 50 Hz / 220-380 V. Treat Chinese GB/T and NB/T reports as background only; prepare 60 Hz IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, Nicaragua-specific firmware settings, and ENATREL/distributor-ready interconnection documents before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼加拉瓜60 Hz / 120-240 V电网是针对50 Hz / 220-380 V验证的中国光伏逆变器的真实工程门槛。中国GB/T和NB/T报告仅应作为背景资料；项目提交前须准备60 Hz下的IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、尼加拉瓜专用固件参数，以及可供ENATREL/配电公司审查的并网文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼加拉瓜60 Hz / 120-240 V電網是針對50 Hz / 220-380 V驗證的中國光伏逆變器的真實工程門檻。中國GB/T和NB/T報告僅應作為背景資料；項目提交前須準備60 Hz下的IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、尼加拉瓜專用韌體參數，以及可供ENATREL/配電公司審查的併網文件。

requirement_topic.en: Nicaragua Distributed and Utility PV Project Gate — MEM Policy Context, INE Regulation, ENATREL / Distributor Coordination, and SIEPAC Context
requirement_topic.zh: 尼加拉瓜分布式及公用事业光伏项目门槛——MEM政策背景、INE监管、ENATREL / 配电公司协调及SIEPAC背景
requirement_topic.zht: 尼加拉瓜分散式及公用事業光伏項目門檻——MEM政策背景、INE監管、ENATREL / 配電公司協調及SIEPAC背景

summary.en: Nicaragua has a renewable-heavy electricity context including geothermal, wind, hydro, biomass, and growing solar deployment, and it participates in the Central American SIEPAC regional interconnection. For a grid-tied PV inverter, however, renewable policy support is not a substitute for equipment acceptance. Utility-scale and distributed projects require project-specific coordination with MEM/INE, ENATREL where transmission or system operation is involved, and DISNORTE/DISSUR or another applicable distributor at distribution level. Equipment documentation should identify the exact inverter model, grid-support functions, anti-islanding behavior, export-control functions if required by the project, and Spanish-language installation and commissioning instructions.
summary.zh: 尼加拉瓜电力背景中可再生能源占比较高，包括地热、风电、水电、生物质以及增长中的太阳能，并参与中美洲SIEPAC区域互联。但对并网光伏逆变器而言，可再生能源政策支持并不等同于设备验收。公用事业规模及分布式项目均需与MEM/INE进行项目专属协调；涉及输电或系统运行时需与ENATREL协调；配电层级则需与DISNORTE/DISSUR或其他适用配电公司协调。设备文件应明确逆变器具体型号、并网友好功能、防孤岛行为、项目要求时的限发功能，以及西班牙语安装和调试说明。
summary.zht: 尼加拉瓜電力背景中可再生能源占比較高，包括地熱、風電、水電、生物質以及增長中的太陽能，並參與中美洲SIEPAC區域互聯。但對併網光伏逆變器而言，可再生能源政策支持並不等同於設備驗收。公用事業規模及分散式項目均需與MEM/INE進行項目專屬協調；涉及輸電或系統運行時需與ENATREL協調；配電層級則需與DISNORTE/DISSUR或其他適用配電公司協調。設備文件應明確逆變器具體型號、併網友好功能、防孤島行為、項目要求時的限發功能，以及西班牙語安裝和調試說明。

standards_or_laws: MEM electricity-sector policy and planning role for Nicaragua
INE electricity regulation and supervision role for Nicaragua
ENATREL transmission and system coordination role where relevant
DISNORTE/DISSUR or other distributor project-level interconnection requirements
SIEPAC regional interconnection context for Central America

summary.en: China distributed PV and utility-scale PV approvals are handled under Chinese energy policy, grid company connection procedures, and domestic standards such as NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and GB/T 19964. Those approvals are tied to Chinese grid codes, Chinese-language documentation, China grid voltage and frequency, and Chinese commissioning practice. They do not provide approval status with MEM, INE, ENATREL, or a Nicaraguan distributor.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏和公用事业光伏审批受中国能源政策、电网公司接入程序及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964等国内标准管理。这些审批与中国电网规范、中文文件、中国电网电压和频率以及中国调试实践绑定，不构成MEM、INE、ENATREL或尼加拉瓜配电公司的批准状态。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏和公用事業光伏審批受中國能源政策、電網公司接入程序及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964等國內標準管理。這些審批與中國電網規範、中文文件、中國電網電壓和頻率以及中國調試實踐綁定，不構成MEM、INE、ENATREL或尼加拉瓜配電公司的批准狀態。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: there is no automatic transfer from a Chinese domestic PV approval package to a Nicaragua project approval package. Exporters should prepare Spanish-language technical files, model-family certificates, IEC safety and grid evidence, Nicaragua-specific settings, single-line diagrams, protection philosophy, commissioning records, and clear owner/operator responsibilities for MEM/INE and ENATREL or distributor review. SIEPAC participation may add regional coordination for large projects, but it does not remove the local interconnection gate.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内光伏审批资料包不会自动转化为尼加拉瓜项目审批资料包。出口商应准备西班牙语技术文件、型号系列证书、IEC安全和并网证据、尼加拉瓜专用参数、单线图、保护方案、调试记录，以及供MEM/INE和ENATREL或配电公司审查的业主/运营方责任说明。SIEPAC参与可能使大型项目增加区域协调，但不会取消本地并网门槛。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內光伏審批資料包不會自動轉化為尼加拉瓜項目審批資料包。出口商應準備西班牙語技術文件、型號系列證書、IEC安全和併網證據、尼加拉瓜專用參數、單線圖、保護方案、調試記錄，以及供MEM/INE和ENATREL或配電公司審查的業主/運營方責任說明。SIEPAC參與可能使大型項目增加區域協調，但不會取消本地併網門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a project approval matter for grid-tied PV — consult MEM/INE and the applicable ENATREL/distributor process before shipment or installation
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic distributed or utility PV approval is not transferable to Nicaragua

source.publisher: Ministerio de Energía y Minas (MEM), Nicaragua

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nicaragua's renewable-energy context and SIEPAC participation do not create automatic inverter acceptance. Prepare a Nicaragua-specific project file for MEM/INE and ENATREL or distributor review, including Spanish documentation, IEC evidence, and 60 Hz / 120-240 V firmware settings before committing a Chinese inverter model to a project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼加拉瓜可再生能源背景和SIEPAC参与并不产生逆变器自动验收。将中国逆变器型号用于项目前，应准备面向MEM/INE及ENATREL或配电公司审查的尼加拉瓜专用项目文件，包括西班牙语文件、IEC证据和60 Hz / 120-240 V固件设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼加拉瓜可再生能源背景和SIEPAC參與並不產生逆變器自動驗收。將中國逆變器型號用於項目前，應準備面向MEM/INE及ENATREL或配電公司審查的尼加拉瓜專用項目文件，包括西班牙語文件、IEC證據和60 Hz / 120-240 V韌體設置。
